_about: The contestable tier registry. Every motive tier on the board comes from here, so the judgement is public and forkable, not hidden. Tier is claim-relative and based on an OBSERVABLE fact (what the entity sells / is), NOT a quality or truth verdict. Contest any cell: the basis is stated so you can argue it.

contest.how: Email a cell you dispute with the observable fact you think is wrong, or fork this file. Tiers change on evidence, not on disagreement with the conclusion.

entities.basis: primary record produced under legal or statutory process; least incentive to shade a specific number
mandated public measurement; the primary IS the check

Three-hat structural conflict, left-right neutral. (1) REGULATOR: gates model releases and sets AI policy (2026 safety-review holds). (2) CUSTOMER: procures AI and awards or withholds federal contracts (Anthropic reportedly frozen out mid-2026). (3) OWNER: holds equity in strategic firms (Intel ~10%, MP Materials 15%, Lithium Americas / Trilogy 10%) and was offered a 5% stake in OpenAI (early-stage, not finalised). A government AI claim moves three books at once: policy, procurement, portfolio. Claim-relative: agency primary DATA (Fed, USGS, BLS) stays tier 1.
entities.conflict: Three hats: regulates, buys from, and owns (or is offered ownership of) the AI firms it comments on.

entities.basis: nonprofit research institute; credibility is the product. WATCH: funder prior (AI-safety mission may tilt framing toward 'AI is significant')
method rigour (review, randomisation). WATCH: industry funding on the paper, and lag (rigour lands after the panic take)
independent AI evaluation orgs checking others' claims; incentive is being right, not selling a model
commercial analysts who sell reports AND consult the vendors they rate; round often-unfalsifiable forecasts
independent analyst; data quality high but paywalls the load-bearing conclusion (access is the product)

entities.entity: Trade press (TechCrunch, VentureBeat, The Verge, Ars Technica)
entities.basis: industry journalism; access + engagement (conflict drives clicks). A take against the outlet's own audience usually carries less book
wire / quality press; item-dependent, corroborate to the cited primary
SEO/analytics tool vendors; the data is often sound, the alarm framing helps sell the subscription
sells frontier AI models; tier 5 on AI-value and its own-capability claims. Claim-relative: lower on unrelated facts
sells frontier AI models; tier 5 on its own-capability and AI-value claims
builds and sells the AI and the ad system the claim is often about
sells the platform and the models; tier 5 on its own-capability claims
sells the models and the cloud; tier 5 on its own-code-automation claims
sells the compute; tier 5 on 'is AI demand real'
adopters with an investor 'we are AI-efficient' narrative and a layoff justification; tier 5 on their own usage claims
independent, no product tied to a market call, publishes reproducible CC-BY. On the career pivot itself the incentive is present and disclosed

entities.entity: The Anthropic model that helped build this
entities.basis: a frontier-lab model helped assign these tiers, including the tiers on Anthropic and its rivals. Not exempt from its own map; corroborate its load-bearing calls against a non-model source
